# Sebastian Ardila Agudelo - Professional Profile

## Who
Sebastian Ardila Agudelo is a Senior Frontend Engineer and Director of User Experience with 9+ years of experience based in Pereira, Colombia. Available for remote work worldwide.

## Current Roles
- Director of User Experience at RunMyProcess (AK Digital LLC) - since December 2024
- Senior Full Stack Engineer, Architect & Business Development at Clinity - collaborator
- CEO & Founder of Copairo

## Core Skills
- Frontend: React, TypeScript, JavaScript, Next.js, Redux, Tailwind CSS, HTML/CSS
- Backend: Node.js, Express.js, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, GraphQL, REST APIs, Python
- Cloud & DevOps: AWS (S3, CloudFront, EC2, ECS), Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, Vercel
- AI Integration: OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini
- Design: Figma, UI/UX Design, Accessibility (WCAG)
- Leadership: Stakeholder Management, Technical Leadership, Product Strategy, Agile & Scrum

## Career History
- 2024-Present: Director of UX & Sr. Software Engineer at RunMyProcess
- 2020-2023: Software Engineer II at VeriTran
- 2019: Implementation Consultant at VeriTran
- 2018-2019: Full Stack Developer at ExcelAscent
- 2018: Backend Web Developer at Tecnología Digital 7
- 2017-2018: Software Developer at Onyx Soft

## Education
Bachelor of Computer and Systems Engineering - Universidad Tecnológica de Pereira, 2017
